✨ Special Day ✨

Happy Birthday
Meinxhie! 🎂

Today's all yours — enjoy every second of it.

🎈 🌸 🎀 🌸 🎈
Hi Meinxhie 🎉

Happy birthday bro.

Yeah we don't hang out that much — like at all honestly. But somehow that doesn't really change anything. You're still one of those people I actually think about, and that's not something I say to just anyone. So take it as a compliment and don't make it weird. Haha.

It's kind of funny how you can just know someone and not need to be around them 24/7 for it to actually mean something. That's just how it is with some people.

🌸 💕 🌸

Also yeah, threw in some photos below. One's from fb, one's from you, and one's from way back — like embarrassingly way back lmao. Don't judge the quality, judge the memories. Hahaha I'm kidding. Kind of.

But for real though — I hope today is actually good. Not just "people texting happy birthday at 12am and then disappearing" good. Like actually good. Good food, good people around you, good energy the whole day. You deserve that version of a birthday, not the half-hearted one.

You're a good person Meinxhie, even if we don't say that stuff out loud that much. Just know it.

Joke aside — happy happy happy birthday bro. Hope this made you smile at least a little.

— Kenneth 🎈
